channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: America's 250th carries somber note for forcibly displaced Indigenous groups
item.description: Every couple of years members of the Eastern Shawnee Tribe of Oklahoma travel back to visit ancestral and historic sites located in the Midwest. Members say it's especially poignant as the country celebrates the 250th year of American independence.
item.content:encoded: Every couple of years members of the Eastern Shawnee Tribe of Oklahoma travel back to visit ancestral and historic sites located in the Midwest. Members say it's especially poignant as the country celebrates the 250th year of American independence.
item.dc:creator: Adriana Martinez-Smiley

item.title: A cavalcade of international stars headlined the World Cup's first-ever halftime final show
item.description: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise.
item.content:encoded:
With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise.

(Image credit: Mauro Pimentel)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: MLS works to bring in a new generation of fans as the World Cup comes to an end
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?
item.content:encoded:
In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?

(Image credit: Ethan Swope)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Spain is the 2026 World Cup champion, defeating Argentina for its 2nd title
item.description: Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.
item.content:encoded:
Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.

(Image credit: David Ramos)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Florida on charges of rape and sex trafficking
item.description: Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been arrested in Miami after British authorities issued 38 new charges against them, and said they are "seeking extradition" for the two men.
item.content:encoded:
Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been arrested in Miami after British authorities issued 38 new charges against them, and said they are "seeking extradition" for the two men.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: Robbie Griffiths

item.title: Reporter's Notebook: Finding World Cup joy in speaking to women who love soccer
item.description: Tune into World Cup coverage, and you are likely to see waves of male, screaming, sweaty fans. But one of the joys of covering this World Cup has been speaking to women who love soccer.
item.content:encoded:
Tune into World Cup coverage, and you are likely to see waves of male, screaming, sweaty fans. But one of the joys of covering this World Cup has been speaking to women who love soccer.

(Image credit: Danielle Villasana for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: 1 year on, Texas rains reopen wounds of deadly 2025 Hill Country flood for survivors
item.description: As rainfall saturates Texas this week, Lorena Guillen reflects on the year it has been since she and her husband tried to save a family from their RV park in the massive Hill Country floods last year.
item.content:encoded: As rainfall saturates Texas this week, Lorena Guillen reflects on the year it has been since she and her husband tried to save a family from their RV park in the massive Hill Country floods last year.
item.dc:creator: Lucio Vasquez

item.title: Latest update on the fatal shootings of 2 men by federal immigration agents
item.description: Allegations of domestic violence add to the concerns about an ICE officer who shot and killed a man in Maine July 13.
item.content:encoded: Allegations of domestic violence add to the concerns about an ICE officer who shot and killed a man in Maine July 13.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Hunter Biden shares his painful road to recovery and fight against political scrutiny
item.description: NPR's Scott Simon asks Hunter Biden about his addiction, treatments, and political notoriety.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Scott Simon asks Hunter Biden about his addiction, treatments, and political notoriety.
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: Meet the drag performers teaching rigorous ecology in Portland parks
item.description: In Portland, Ore., two nature aficionados have combined their love of the outdoors with their love of drag, providing guided walks in a local park that include all the sparkle and pizzazz of a drag show.
item.content:encoded: In Portland, Ore., two nature aficionados have combined their love of the outdoors with their love of drag, providing guided walks in a local park that include all the sparkle and pizzazz of a drag show.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Wood
